data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for provider visibility of completion status. However, the evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate how the provider can view the completion status of tasks. The linked use case mentions the provider dashboard showing completion percentages, but lacks concrete evidence of the underlying API or data structure that supports this functionality, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API or data structure that provides provider visibility of completion status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for provider completion status visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns the correct completion status for tasks assigned to the provider.
